description_long: This object is a lush potted plant featuring large, heart-shaped green leaves with prominent white veins. The foliage is dense, with leaves overlapping and cascading outward from the central stems, creating a full and vibrant appearance. The plant is housed in a woven basket-style pot, which has a textured, brown exterior resembling natural fibers. The leaves exhibit a healthy, matte finish and are arranged in multiple layers, giving the plant a bushy, well-maintained look. The pot is medium-sized and appears sturdy, providing stable support for the plant. This type of potted plant is commonly used to add a touch of greenery and natural beauty to urban environments such as offices, homes, or public indoor spaces.
description: A dense, leafy green plant with heart-shaped leaves in a woven basket-style pot, featuring a natural, textured brown exterior.
description_view_0: Front view shows overlapping heart-shaped leaves with the woven basket pot partially visible at the base.
description_view_1: This angle highlights the right side, revealing more of the leaf layering and the basket's texture.
description_view_2: A nearly symmetrical view with the plant's central stems and the full width of the basket pot visible.
description_view_3: Left side view, showing the cascading leaves and the basket pot's woven pattern, with some leaves partially obscuring the pot.
